goal-audit Audit current project state against W:current-goal. Reads the goal record and the project state, writes a verdict {pass|fail, reasons, evidence} to W:last-audit-verdict. Pure reader — does not decide flow.
code-dev-link Cross-project links — declare and resolve "depends on project X / phase Y"
code-dev-journal-event Append a state-change event to {project}/_events.log
code-dev-state-save Phase 5 — alias for code-dev-state-save (milestone snapshot; rewind restores)
code-dev-journal-search Full-text search across project artifacts (logs, specs, decisions, prohibitions, reviewer state)
code-dev-state-undo Reverse the last write recorded in _actions.log
code-dev-load Switch active code-dev project; reads schema-version
audit-to-study Convert the latest goal-audit verdict into structured study input for the next code-dev iteration. Writes study notes that code-dev-study reads on its next pass.
authoring-guide Checklist and patterns for writing well-formed AXON programs
auto-actions Render a recap of recent auto-edits from the audit ledger.
auto-improve Daily orchestrator. Closes auto-applicable improvement loops with
autonomy-contract Interactive autonomy contract — interview the human for powers, write policy + grant + ledger (overnight entry gate)
autonomy-reanchor Autonomous-run reanchor — identity (via axon-reanchor) + operating-frame re-assertion, fail-closed
axon-audit Scrutinize AXON — structural integrity (1a: boot, refs, internals) and usefulness evaluation (1b: health, coverage, token savings potential)
axon-compare Search the web for AXON's online presence and compare it against similar agent orchestration / harness frameworks
axon-docs-gen Generate complete AXON documentation with architecture diagrams and relationship maps
axon-graph Deterministic in-house code-graph over AXON's own Python tree — blast-radius, dead-code, god-nodes
code-dev-pr-suggest-reviewer pr-suggest-reviewer — pick reviewer from history/CODEOWNERS
orchestrator Mainline loop (PR-111) — after a neuron fires, query synapse-suggest, walk the DAG, render the next-action set. Both fixed-workflow and adaptive-free-text modes covered.
code-dev-next Suggest the single most-relevant next command for the current state ("10-moment classifier")
mode-suggest After 3 turns in a mode, surface related programs the user might want next
mode-detect Classify free-text input, suggest the right mode, offer to switch
